Expected cleaned output should contain:
- Main article content without navigation, footers, scripts, or styles
- All HTML tags stripped leaving plain text
- Whitespace normalized to single spaces
- No JavaScript code or console output
- No footer copyright text
- No navigation menus

Example for drupal-page.html:
"Building Scalable Drupal Sites Drupal is a powerful content management system that scales to enterprise needs. In this article, we explore best practices for building large-scale Drupal implementations. Key Considerations Database optimization Caching strategies Content architecture Performance monitoring When building for scale..."

Example for wordpress-post.html:
"WordPress Security Best Practices Posted on January 15, 2024 WordPress powers over 40% of the web. With such widespread adoption, security is paramount. Here are essential practices for keeping your WordPress site safe. Keep Everything Updated The first and most important step is keeping WordPress core, themes, and plugins updated..."
